classes.reasoning: This is a commercial office lease agreement between Inversiones Castellana 41, S.A. (lessor) and Biorce Therapeutics S.L. (lessee) for office premises in Madrid. It is a real estate contract, not a clinical trial document or any type of regulated Trial Master File artifact.

summary: This is a commercial office lease agreement dated 01 February 2022 for office premises at Calle de Serrano 41, Madrid, Spain, between Inversiones Castellana 41, S.A. (lessor) and Biorce Therapeutics S.L. (lessee). The document explicitly prohibits laboratory or pharmaceutical manufacturing activities and is a real estate contract unrelated to clinical trial activities.
